assumptions: Allowed paths are write scopes; workers may read broader project context as needed.
Shadow Bridge files are isolated into single-file work units.
Work units are generated from the scanned graph, metrics manifest, and GIV profile.
project_goal: Deliver isolated work units for frontend while preserving GIV invariants.
risks: 36 Shadow Bridge edge(s) require isolated handling
One or more graph nodes are below the gravity hard floor
